# Direct dependencies (bounded). The authoritative, exact environment is
# requirements.lock.<host>, generated by scripts/freeze_environment.py.
# torch is installed per-machine with its CUDA variant and is pinned in the lock,
# not here (local: cu121 wheel; 24GB machine: cu118 wheel).
